analysis.summary: The technician logged into the Administrator account, moved the 'Downloads' folder from the desktop to the Administrator user profile directory, then downloaded and installed AnyDesk remote access software. Subsequently, Remote Desktop was enabled on the system before a restart was initiated.
actions_taken: Moved the 'Downloads' folder from the desktop to 'C:\Users\Administrator'.
Downloaded and installed AnyDesk remote access software.
Enabled Remote Desktop in Windows Settings.

tech_performance.efficiency_notes: The technician worked very methodically, completing tasks in a logical sequence (organize desktop, install remote tool, enable RDP, restart) without any noticeable hesitation or deviation.
